title: Reap: Automatic Curation of Coding Agent Benchmarks
abstract: Reap automates the curation and management of coding agents, enhancing productivity and ensuring consistency in software development projects.
abstract_zh: 这工具就是那个帮你自动整理代码小助手的，简直是码农们的生产力神器！再也不用担心项目进度不一致了，工作效率直接起飞，跟小伙伴吹逼的时候都能炫耀这是Reap帮我的！
